title: APEX SKU Manifest
description: Shape of agent-output/{project}/sku-manifest.json — the single source of truth for creative SKU decisions (App Service, VM, SQL, Cosmos, AKS pools, Redis, APIM, App Gateway, Storage replication) across environments (dev/test/prod) and regions (primary + failover). Created at Step 1 (user-pins only), populated at Step 2 (Architect), reconciled at Step 3.5/Step 4, blocked-on-conflict at Step 6, drift-detected at Step 7. Enforced by tools/scripts/validate-sku-manifest.mjs. Out of scope (must not appear in services[]): bandwidth, Log Analytics, vnet, subnet, NSG, route table, public IP, diagnostics — see .github/instructions/sku-manifest.instructions.md exclude list.

$schema.description: Optional JSON-Schema reference for editor tooling.

default_region.description: Primary Azure region; per-service regions[] inherits this when omitted.

environments.description: Set of environments this manifest applies to. Per-service overrides keyed by these names.

revisions.description: Append-only revision metadata. Boundaries are git commits / apex-recall checkpoints — not a free-form changelog.

agent.description: Agent that authored this revision (e.g. 02-Requirements, 03-Architect, 05-IaC Planner).

step.description: Workflow step that produced this revision.

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA stamped by post-write hook (may be absent until commit).

apex_recall_checkpoint.description: apex-recall checkpoint identifier for this revision.

changed_ids.description: services[].id values added, modified, or removed in this revision.

services.description: Creative SKU decisions only. Excludes infrastructure-default resources (bandwidth, Log Analytics, vnet, subnet, NSG, route table, public IP, diagnostics) — see .github/instructions/sku-manifest.instructions.md.

stamps.description: Optional multi-stamp / multi-deployment overlay. Each stamp represents an independent deployment of the same workload (e.g. per-tenant, per-region instance) and may override SKUs, regions, and environments for a subset of services[]. Stamps are additive: when absent, the manifest behaves as a single-stamp project. When present, the validator and consumers MUST apply per-stamp overrides on top of base services[] and environment_overrides.

sku_allowlist_snapshot.description: Normalized SKU allowlist projection derived from 04-governance-constraints.json. Written by 04g-Governance after Phase 2 discovery; cross-checked by validate-sku-manifest.mjs against services[].size at Step 4 (Planner) and later. Empty / absent → no governance-side SKU restrictions applied to this project.

allowed_skus.description: Map of canonical service name → allowed SKU patterns. Patterns support glob-style wildcards (e.g. 'GP_*', 'P1v3*').

denied_skus.description: Map of canonical service name → explicitly denied SKU patterns. Takes precedence over allowed_skus when both are present.

source.description: Provenance of this SKU choice. user-pin = locked by user at Step 1; architect-derived = chosen by Architect at Step 2; deploy-substitute = substituted at Step 6 due to quota/region conflict.

envOverride.description: Sparse override map — include only the fields that differ from the base service entry.

actualSku.description: Populated by 08-As-Built from deployed resource state. Keyed by environment, then region.

^(dev|test|stage|prod)$.description: Map of region → deployed SKU string.

id.description: Unique within services[]. Lowercase kebab. Cross-checked by validator (JSON Schema uniqueItems on objects compares full identity, not just id).

service.description: Azure service name (e.g. 'App Service Plan', 'SQL Database', 'Cosmos DB', 'AKS Node Pool').

size.description: Base SKU/tier (e.g. 'P1v3', 'GP_S_Gen5_2', 'Standard_D4s_v5'). Per-env overrides in environment_overrides.

zonal.description: True when the SKU is deployed zone-redundantly (AZ 1/2/3).

regions.description: [primary, ...failover]. Inherits manifest default_region when a service entry omits this field — but JSON requires explicit value; planner sets it.

sla_achieved.description: Architect-computed SLA based on SKU + zonal + regions.

requires.description: Feature dependencies (e.g. 'vnet-integration', 'private-endpoints', 'managed-identity'). Cross-checked at Step 4 against SKU capability matrix.

last_modified_rev.description: Most recent revisions[].rev that touched this entry.

cost_estimate_monthly_usd.description: Populated by cost-estimate-subagent via manifest_writeback[]. Number, USD/month.

cost_estimated_at.description: Timestamp of the last cost-estimate-subagent writeback for this service. Used by validate-sku-manifest.mjs to flag stale pricing (>30 days).

stamp.description: Independent deployment overlay. Stamps may pin specific environments + regions for the same workload (e.g. one stamp per tenant / geography). Service-level overrides ride on top of the base services[] entries.

regions.description: Regions this stamp targets. May differ from the manifest default_region.

environments.description: Subset of top-level environments[] this stamp is deployed to. When omitted, inherits all environments[].

service_overrides.description: Map of services[].id → sparse override. Same shape as environment_overrides values; applied on top of (env override → base entry).
